title: デビュー戦の後に・風水は奇跡にあらず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... I did it—I managed to run all the way to the end somehow. ☆

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there's something kinda fascinating about
the way she runs.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the decisions she makes on corners are
pretty unique.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The basis of Copano Rickey's running style is feng
shui. It looks like certain aspects of her unusual
approach have left an impression on the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer! It looks like making the door orange really paid off! That race felt so good. ☆
choice_data_list: Yeah, you ran really well out there!
Yeah, you ran really well out there!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So, what should our next goal be?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If it's doable, I want to win a big race as soon as
possible, to show everyone that they can be
happy...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But there's one area that really needs improvement right now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Somewhere that really needs improvement... If
we're talking feng shui, that would be...
choice_data_list: Luck? Or the flow of qi?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Nope, nothing like that. What I need to work on is my strength!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm given a surprisingly grounded answer. She also
provides a clear explanation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui doesn't make miracles happen. It's
about creating the right environment to ensure
you can fully utilize the skills you already have.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's like how someone who's never kicked a ball
could never beat a soccer pro. It's the same idea.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui is ultimately a doctrine that exists to
help you fully accomplish everything you're
capable of.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Right now, there's a huge vortex of qi at the
center of the Twinkle Series. I'm not saying that
success would be impossible, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Just creating the right environment won't get me
anywhere. I think it might be too early for me to
take on a big race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like feng shui isn't some kind of
all-powerful resource. For now, we put off
deciding on our next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Hokko Tarumae! Hokko Tarumae has barreled
through the competition and over the finish line!
A well-earned G3 win!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
At long last, she's secured a graded race victory!
The angel of Tomakomai finally has some great
news to share with her hometown!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I did it... I actually did it! I got my first trophy for
Tomakomai!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Tarumae! That was a great run!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Rickey. I had a feeling... that today—today—I could bring honor to my sash, and I finally did it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Your sash? You mean that thing you're wearing
over your shoulder?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. The people of my hometown gave it to
me. I love Tomakomai, and it means more to me
than anything...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
So they gave me a handmade sash, and said I was
the Tomakomai tourism ambassador. But I never
felt like I was living up to the title.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Until today! I finally feel like I've repaid that
kindness—at least a little bit, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wow. That's great! I'm so proud of you, Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like spring's finally come for Hokko
Tarumae—a racer who, while a little ahead of us,
had been struggling out there.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tarumae! I have an idea about how you can
help your hometown even more...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's feng shui-related, but would you like to hear
it? I think it'll help you out.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui? Come on, Rickey. We have to get
serious here.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing wrong with having a hobby, but a
runner's got to focus on the people supporting
them.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I'll see you later. Thanks for celebrating with me
today.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Tarumae!
...Hmm. The people supporting me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer. She's right, isn't she?
choice_data_list:
Yeah. The people around you are part of your
environment too.

Yeah. The people around you are part of your
environment too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good point! ☆ You know, I think you're
starting to get the hang of feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, maybe I should take a leaf out of
Tarumae's book and surround myself with more
people who'll support me.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. How about we make our next goal a
two-in-one? I'm thinking we should get more fans
and also search for fellow racers who'll support
me. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first thing we need to do is create an
environment that ticks her feng shui boxes.
Instead of overreaching for a big race, we decide
to focus on strengthening her foundation first.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Racers who'll support me... It's true. If I'm going to
get stronger, I'll need partners like that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But can you actually think of anyone who'd help
me out? Hmm. I don't know how easy it'd be to
find a dirt racer who'd be on board.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right. This is the perfect time to let feng shui
lead the way. ☆ The lucky color that will guide
me to success is...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Lend me your wisdom...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? Darkness? ...No, that's not right.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Black? So my lucky color's black. This color is the
key to helping me gather friends and fans!
